message:
fix(reconcile): phase enum, error sanitize, timeout, test isolation (#6935) (#6936)

Address 8 Copilot review comments from PR #6934:

1. Use CRD-compliant "Complete" phase instead of "Succeeded"
2. Sanitize error messages in ClusterStatuses to avoid leaking internals
3. Update docstring to accurately reflect no-retry behavior
4. Add 5-minute timeout to reconciliation context
5. Remove real kubeconfig dependency from tests (nil k8sClient)
6. Assert UpdateConfig error in test setup
7. Update test assertions to use "Complete" phase
8. Propagate resourceVersion from updateStatus return value

Closes #6935

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
